nodes.label: Weighted Nuclear Norm Matrix Completion for RSS Fingerprint Recovery
nodes.source_file: raw/Tan et al. - 2020 - An Efficient Fingerprint Database Construction App.pdf | My Library | Zotero.pdf
nodes.rationale: Converting matrix completion to weighted nuclear norm with L1 and Frobenius norms simultaneously reduces outlier influence and Gaussian noise, improving recovery fidelity over standard nuclear norm minimization.
